description: Add product_search_by_category(product_id, category) function to product module
Add stock_movement_get_total_inbound(product_id) and stock_movement_get_total_outbound(product_id)
Add dashboard_low_stock_count(threshold) that counts products below threshold
Add supplier_get_by_rating(min_rating) to filter suppliers by rating field
Add customer_search_by_email(email) to find customer by email address
Add invoice_calculate_discount(invoice_id, discount_pct) that applies percentage discount
Add payment_get_total_collected(start_date, end_date) for date-range aggregation
Add batch_get_expiring_by_date(target_date) returning batches expiring before date
Add serial_number_get_by_status(status) to list serials by lifecycle status
Add warehouse_get_total_capacity() returning sum of all warehouse capacities
Add workflow_get_by_approver(approver_role) to list workflows pending for a role
Add permission_get_role_summary(role) returning count of actions per role
Add tax_calculate_with_discount(subtotal, discount, tax_rate) combining discount + tax
Add currency_convert_to_base(amount, from_currency) converting any currency to base
Add report_sales_by_customer(customer_id) for per-customer sales breakdown
Fix: product_search returns duplicates when name contains special regex-like characters
Fix: purchase_create does not set status field — default to 'draft'
Fix: sales_cancel does not update stock movements (reversal missing)
Fix: payment_refund does not update invoice balance
Fix: permission_check returns true for non-existent action when role has other actions
Fix: stock_transfer_complete does not check if transfer is already completed (double-complete)
Fix: notification_search returns empty for partial name matches (exact match only)
Fix: reorder_check returns false when current_stock equals min_level (should trigger reorder)
Fix: invoice_generate_number resets sequence on each call (no persistence)
Fix: dashboard_summary doubles counts when called multiple times
Fix: helpers_find_in_list returns first match only when multiple items have same value
Fix: storage_update returns false but still updates data (inconsistent return)
Fix: export_csv_products includes header row in data count
Fix: workflow_fulfill does not validate all required fields before fulfilling
Fix: valuation_get returns wrong cost when multiple valuations exist for same product
Fix: pagination_calculate_offset returns negative for page 0
Fix: notification_reorder fires for inactive products
Fix: currency_convert uses wrong rate for same-currency conversion (applies rate)
Fix: supplier_update does not track updated_at timestamp
Fix: product_calculate_total_value uses wrong field name for cost price
Refactor: rename 'customer' functions to use 'client_' prefix across all modules
Refactor: extract price_calculation helpers from invoice into dedicated price.ail module
Refactor: rename 'movement_create' to 'movement_add' across entire codebase
Refactor: consolidate all storage access functions into storage.ail (remove inline access)
Refactor: rename 'warehouse' to 'facility' across entire codebase
Refactor: extract date_helpers from helpers.ail into new date_utils.ail module
Refactor: split notification.ail into notification_low_stock.ail and notification_general.ail
Refactor: rename 'batch' functions to 'lot_' prefix across all modules
Refactor: extract order_total calculation from purchase_order and sales_order into shared module
Refactor: rename 'audit_trail' functions to 'log_' prefix across all modules
Upgrade: storage_add signature adds 'overwrite' parameter (default false)
Upgrade: helpers_current_timestamp now returns ISO 8601 string instead of unix timestamp
Upgrade: movement_create adds 'created_by' parameter (required, no default)
Upgrade: product_create adds 'tags' parameter (list of strings, default empty)
Upgrade: storage_save now validates that collection name is non-empty before saving
